## New Research

### CAS: Climate-Driven Impact on Typhoon Risk and Insurance Losses
- Evolving climate conditions reshaping cat risk and insured losses from typhoons
- Updated loss modeling frameworks for pricing and reserving in typhoon-exposed markets
- Source: https://www.casact.org/article/cas-research-examines-climate-driven-impact-typhoon-risk-and-insurance-losses | April 2026

### SOA: Actuaries Climate Index Within Weather Derivatives Framework
- Evaluates how ACI can be applied within weather derivatives pricing frameworks
- Index-based products (CDD, HDD) already trade on CME
- Proposes extending ACI methodology to weather derivatives as complementary risk transfer mechanism
- Source: https://www.soa.org/globalassets/assets/files/static-pages/research/arch/2026/arch-2026-iss-1-garrido.pdf | 2026

### Actuaries Climate Index — March 2026 Data Disclosure Update
- Four North American actuarial societies (AAA, CIA, CAS, SOA) released March 2026 data
- ACI tracks climate extremes and their impact on actuarial assumptions

### UNDP: 2026 Rome Climate Finance Dialogue (Apr 17)
- Global climate finance mobilization efforts discussed at Rome forum

### WEF: Insurance as Part of the Climate Solution (Mar 2026)
- Insurance sector's expanding role in climate resilience and risk management

### EIOPA: Insurance Protection Gap in Climate Change (Apr 16)
- EIOPA analysis of widening protection gaps across EU member states
- Climate change accelerating uninsured loss trajectories

### Munich Re: 2025 Natural Catastrophe Data — 92% Weather-Related Losses (Mar 2026)
- 2025 natural catastrophe insured losses: 92% attributed to weather-related events
- Historical data underscores shift toward secondary peril dominance
